channel.title: ChatAd Land
channel.description: Insights into SEO, GEO, and AEO for the AI search era.

item.title: Another AEO Agency Launched This Month Selling What Google Just Said Doesn't Work
item.description: Coozmoo's new AEO/GEO service pitches visibility inside ChatGPT and Gemini days after Google's own guide named the exact tactics that don't move the needle.

item.title: Google Just Told the AEO Industry Half Its Playbook Doesn't Work
item.description: Google's updated guide to generative AI search openly lists the AEO and GEO tactics it ignores, and the list is longer than most agencies want to admit.

item.title: The Shift to Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)
item.description: Why traditional SEO is losing ground and what it takes to be the source an AI actually cites.

item.title: The 2026 Guide to AEO: Why Answers Are the New SEO
item.description: Moving beyond keywords to entity-first content that gets cited in AI overviews and conversational search.

item.title: Scaling Across Borders: How AI Marketing Levelled the Field for Israeli Tech
item.description: Why the five-figure US agency retainer model is losing ground, and how founders are using AI tools to build authority themselves.

item.title: Welcome to ChatAd Land
item.description: Why this site exists: tracking the shift from search engines to answer engines, and what it means for how brands get found.
